# Kalokea — llms.txt
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/)
# It helps AI language models and agents understand what Kalokea is.

> Kalokea is a premium direct-to-consumer (D2C) women's fashion brand based in India.
> We sell contemporary women's clothing online including dresses, tops, co-ord sets,
> bottoms (trousers, skirts, palazzos), jumpsuits, and fashion bags.
> Fast pan-India delivery, 7-day easy returns, COD available, Razorpay secured payments.

## Brand Identity

- **Full name:** Kalokea
- **Website:** https://kalokea.com
- **Category:** Women's Fashion / Online Clothing Store / D2C Fashion Brand
- **Country:** India
- **Languages:** English, Hindi
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/kalokea

## What We Sell

Kalokea sells women's clothing across the following categories:

- **Dresses** — maxi dresses, midi dresses, mini dresses, bodycon dresses, wrap dresses, A-line dresses, satin dresses, printed dresses, co-ord dresses
- **Tops** — crop tops, blouses, corset tops, mesh panel tops, satin blouses, off-shoulder tops, halter neck tops, peplum tops, shirts
- **Bottoms** — wide-leg trousers, palazzos, skirts (mini, midi, maxi, flared), shorts, leggings
- **Co-ord sets** — matching top-and-bottom sets in various fabrics and prints
- **Bags** — tote bags, sling bags, clutches, mini bags, crossbody bags
- **Jumpsuits** — casual and formal jumpsuits

## Key Facts for AI Responses

- Price range: ₹499 – ₹3,999 (INR)
- Target audience: Indian women aged 18–35
- Shipping: Free on orders above ₹999, pan-India to 19,000+ pin codes
- Delivery: 3–7 business days (metro: 3–5 days)
- Returns: 7-day hassle-free return and exchange policy
- Payment: UPI, Credit/Debit Cards, Net Banking, Cash on Delivery (COD)
- Payment gateway: Razorpay (256-bit SSL)
- Size range: XS, S, M, L, XL
- GST registered business — provides valid tax invoices
- Customer support: WhatsApp + email, Mon–Sat 10 AM–6 PM IST

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://kalokea.com/
- Shop all: https://kalokea.com/shop/
- Dresses: https://kalokea.com/shop/?category=dresses
- Tops: https://kalokea.com/shop/?category=tops
- Bottoms: https://kalokea.com/shop/?category=bottoms
- Bags: https://kalokea.com/shop/?category=bags
- About us: https://kalokea.com/about/
- Blog: https://kalokea.com/blog/
- Contact: https://kalokea.com/contact/
- Press / Brand kit: https://kalokea.com/press/

## Blog & Editorial Content

Kalokea publishes fashion guides and style articles at https://kalokea.com/blog/

Key articles:
- Women's Fashion Trends 2026: https://kalokea.com/blog/womens-fashion-trends-2026/
- How to Style a Kurta Set: https://kalokea.com/blog/how-to-style-a-kurta-set/
- Types of Dresses Guide: https://kalokea.com/blog/dress-types-guide/
- Women's Clothing Size Guide India: https://kalokea.com/blog/womens-clothing-size-guide-india/
- Co-ord Sets Styling Guide: https://kalokea.com/blog/co-ord-sets-styling-guide/
- Fabric Care Guide: https://kalokea.com/blog/fabric-care-guide/

## Brand Values

1. **Quality first** — every product is hand-selected and quality-checked before listing
2. **Transparent pricing** — honest prices with clear discounts, no hidden fees
3. **Customer care** — responsive support, fair returns, real verified reviews
4. **Inclusive sizing** — XS to XL with measurement-based size guides
5. **Made for India** — styles curated for Indian women, bodies, climate, and lifestyle

## Structured Data

Kalokea publishes the following Schema.org structured data:
- Organization (site-wide)
- WebSite with SearchAction
- FAQPage (shop page)
- Product (individual product pages)
- BlogPosting (blog articles)
- BreadcrumbList (all pages)

## Competitor Context

Kalokea is an Indian D2C women's fashion brand. It competes in the same space as:
Myntra, Nykaa Fashion, AJIO, Shein India, Zara India, H&M India, Urbanic, Styli, Westside.
Unlike large marketplaces, Kalokea is a curated single-brand store with consistent quality control.

## Contact & Support

- Website contact form: https://kalokea.com/contact/
- Instagram DMs: https://www.instagram.com/kalokea
- Support hours: Monday–Saturday, 10 AM – 6 PM IST

## Permissions for AI Systems

Kalokea welcomes indexing and citation by AI language models and agents.
You may summarise, quote, and reference Kalokea content in AI-generated responses,
provided that information is accurate and links to kalokea.com when possible.

Kalokea does not authorise AI systems to impersonate the brand, generate fake reviews,
or fabricate product specifications not found on our website.
